description: Read AI is an AI meeting intelligence platform that captures meeting transcripts, summaries, action items, and analytics. It helps users and teams access and act on meeting data from video conferencing and related workflows.
summary: Read AI exposes two developer integration surfaces in open beta: a REST API at https://api.read.ai/ and a remote MCP server at https://api.read.ai/mcp; both use Read-issued OAuth 2.1 credentials and bearer access tokens.
